```c
uint32_t f_inv(uint32_t v) {
    uint8_t y[4], x[4];
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) { y[i] = v & 0xFF; v >>= 8; }
    
    // x[3] = ROR2(y[3]) - y[2]
    x[3] = (y[3] >> 2) | (y[3] << 6);
    x[3] = (x[3] - y[2]) & 0xFF;
    
    // x1_xor_x0 = ROR2(y[1]) - y[2]
    uint8_t x1_xor_x0 = ((y[1] >> 2) | (y[1] << 6));
    x1_xor_x0 = (x1_xor_x0 - y[2]) & 0xFF;
    
    // x3_xor_x2 = ROR2(y[2]) - x1_xor_x0 - 1
    uint8_t x3_xor_x2 = ((y[2] >> 2) | (y[2] << 6));
    x3_xor_x2 = (x3_xor_x2 - x1_xor_x0 - 1) & 0xFF;
    
    // x[2] = x[3] ^ x3_xor_x2
    x[2] = x[3] ^ x3_xor_x2;
    
    // x[0] = ROR2(y[0]) - y[1] - 1
    x[0] = ((y[0] >> 2) | (y[0] << 6));
    x[0] = (x[0] - y[1] - 1) & 0xFF;
    
    // x[1] = x[0] ^ x1_xor_x0
    x[1] = x[0] ^ x1_xor_x0;
    
    uint32_t r = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) r |= (uint32_t)x[i] << (8*i);
    return r;
}
```
